# Red Skull

## Description

- While your HP is at or below 50%, you have 3 additional Strength.

---

## Strategy Notes

<!-- Reserved for the meta-agent. Append lessons, combos, and heuristics here.
     Source facts live above the divider. -->
- Strong with multi-hit attacks such as Sword Boomerang, but it requires being at or below half HP; do not buy over immediate boss consistency when the plan is to stay healthy.
